subcodes.first_line: O son of the martyr! Upon thee be the salutation of God, the Mighty, the All-Praised! Indeed, that which hath come upon you from the oppressor of the land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن الشهید علیک سلام الله العزیز الحمید قد ورد علیکم من ظالم ارض
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @justice and wrath of God
